changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS verification_request ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, user_profile_id BIGINT NOT NULL, verification_type VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, "status" VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', notes TEXT, reviewed_by VARCHAR(255), reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) ); COMMENT ON TABLE verification_request IS 'Stores identity / document verification requests';
